name: Unified Points
description: Alle pointtyper og triggers i det forenede pointsystem.
agent_prompt: Unified points: xp_points, game_points, trophy_points, dna_manipulation_points, dna_cloning_points, communication_psychology_points, compendium_points. Use add_points for awards. Shop månedstema (theme-*) giver ikke point medmindre eksplicit koblet — se rules.monthly_theme_points.
tech_spec: unified_points_db.add_points(user_id, point_type, amount, source, metadata); unified_points_trigger_integration; triggers map activities to point types
user_guide: Forenede points: XP, game, trophy, DNA, comm. psych, compendium. Aktiviteter giver point.
manual: Agent manual V7: When awarding points, use add_points. Include source and metadata. Triggers fire on video_gen, study_theory, compendium_view.

rules.name: Triggers
rules.text: unified_points_trigger_integration mappes til aktiviteter (video_gen, study_theory, compendium_view, osv.).

rules.name: Profile Display
rules.text: get_profile_display inkluderer alle pointtyper fra unified points.

rules.name: MN2 vs points
rules.text: MN2 on-chain / in-wallet balance er et separat spor fra coins og unified points; 5-dags chart opsummerer bevægelse og påvirker ikke XP/game_points direkte.

rules.name: Shop-boosts og server
rules.text: Nye narrative boosts (fx 5D Monitor — Net Flow Pulse) skal stadig mappes til add_points eller eksisterende services når servereffekt tilføjes — ellers katalog-only.

rules.name: Månedstema og point
rules.text: Køb af theme-january … theme-december (og øvrige wave v7 theme-SKUer) udløser ikke automatisk add_points; metadata/kilde skal angives hvis det implementeres. Kanonisk shop-liste: rulebook_v9_shop.json.
